title: TimelineEvent
description: A recipe-change event for a product (DATA-04, DATA-11). The event date $refs date-value.schema.json so it can be ranged or circa. Each change keeps three distinct fields: documentedChange and statedReason are SourcedValues; labelledInference is a DISTINCT non-SourcedValue shape with a required basis, so analyst inference can never masquerade as sourced fact (the defamation bright line). Verification and publication status are reserved for the Phase 2 gate.

id.description: Stable identifier for the timeline event.

productId.description: Plain reference to the product this event belongs to.

date.description: When the change is recorded as having occurred; precise, ranged or circa.

changes.description: One or more changes recorded at this event.

documentedChange.description: Fact-bearing: the observable, sourced change to the product.

statedReason.description: Fact-bearing: the manufacturer's attributed stated reason for the change, sourced.

labelledInference.description: Analyst inference, explicitly NOT a SourcedValue. It never carries value, confidence or evidence; additionalProperties false makes a SourcedValue-shaped inference rejectable (negative fixture, plan 01-05).

basis.description: The stated basis for the inference.

text.description: The inference itself, labelled as analysis rather than sourced fact.

verificationStatus.description: Reserved for the Phase 2 verification gate (DATA-11); present-and-empty (null) validates.

publicationStatus.description: Reserved for the Phase 2 publication gate (DATA-11); present-and-empty (null) validates.
